summary: A Go-based monolithic testing and validation framework featuring a runner engine, schema validation, and MCP integrations, heavily augmented by automated agent-generated test suites.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/) suggests potential repository bloat or unmanaged artifacts
Mixed git status (modified, staged, untracked) indicates incomplete workflow or interrupted development
Heavy reliance on extra tests (*_extra_test.go) might indicate fragile core test coverage
suggestions: Clean up or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents directories to reduce noise in the codebase
Resolve the current uncommitted git state before starting new features
Consolidate extra tests into standard test files if they are meant to be permanent
Review the new LDAP authentication implementation for security best practices
